summary: Test suite has good unit test coverage and clear organization, but has a critical blocker: Act integration tests reference fixture files (patch-commits.txt, minor-commits.txt, major-commits.txt, noop-commits.txt) that are never created or initialized. BeforeAll sets $script:fixturesDir but never populates it, causing act tests to fail immediately when trying to read non-existent files. Unit tests for Get-BumpType, Get-NewVersion, and Get-ChangelogEntry are comprehensive, but missing edge case tests (e.g., JSON without version field). Workflow structure tests are present but the overall suite would not pass execution due to incomplete fixture setup.
